description: Secondary school student performance in two Portuguese schools
encoding_note: Binarize G3 (final grade 0-20): pass = G3 >= 10, fail = G3 < 10. Treatment = studytime (1=less than 2hrs, 2=2-5hrs, 3=5-10hrs, 4=>10hrs; can group into low=1-2 vs high=3-4). Stratum = school (GP or MS). Aggregate Successes/Cases per (studytime × school) cell.
